_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of OT inventory principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and the documentation standards required at each stage.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RM domain. Knowledge RM-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.488), AG-T-002 (AG, cosine: 0.437).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.530). Shared vocabulary: [inventory, knowledge, practices]. NICE-only terms [ot, principles] vs WIDAI-only terms [classification, complexity, development, documentation, lifecycle, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.918, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.065 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of OT inventory principles and practices" and "Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by ma" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.605 > STS 0.530 (gap +0.075). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [inventory, knowledge, practices] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.2%. Shared tokens: [inventory, knowledge, practices]. NICE-only: [ot, principles]. WIDAI-only: [classification, complexity, development, documentation, lifecycle, management].

signals.detail: STS 0.530 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
